What do I use?

Because I'm interested in what others use on a daily basis I also want to share my things. Most of the things have been accumulated over the years.

Computer / Office

  • 16" MacBook Pro M3 Max (2023)
  • 37.5" Curved UltraWide LG 38WK95C-W
  • Magic Mouse 2
  • Magic Keyboard with numeric
  • Twelve South HiRise Notebook stand
  • IKEA Bekant with adjustable height
  • HÅG Capisco 8107 (saddle chair)

Coding

  • Editor: VSCode
  • Theme: Night Owl
  • Terminal: iTerm2

Audio

  • AirPods Max
  • AirPods Pro

Other tech

  • iPhone 14 Pro
  • Kobo Libra H20
